raw_consumer_statement:
This is with CitiBank. The dispute is of {$3400.00} by XXXX  XXXX CA. I did not receive the service for this transaction. 

XXXX. I submitted an original billing dispute on this purchase on XX/XX/XXXX. 

XXXX. Then I provided evidence on XX/XX/XXXX. Citibank sent me a letter stating that I did not provide any evidence. 

XXXX. I called and talked with a customer care person to reopen the case. I provided evidence of XX/XX/XXXX. The case was again closed on XXXX, XXXX stating I have not provided evidence. 

XXXX. I called again to reopen the case on XX/XX/XXXX. The case went to security department. 

XXXX. Around XX/XX/XXXX, I talked with the security department. They mentioned they are handing over the case to the billing dispute tea, again. 

XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, I called again and talked with another person from the security team. They mentioned that the case is still with them. Then they forwarded the case to the billing dispute team again. 

XXXX. I called on XX/XX/XXXX, it looks like the billing dispute team did not do anything in this XXXX month. 

I reported about this transaction before in XXXX. I received the security team 's response. I want the billing dispute team 's response and investigation report. I want a report discussing my evidences.
